Rung.Comment: Rung to Put the Bypass ON and OFF For ZSC and ZSO
Check for All Permissives and Interlocks

Rung.Text: [XIC(Cfg_FailClose) XIC(Sts_Oper) [XIC(OCmd_Open) XIC(Sts_Ready) ,XIC(Out) ] XIO(OCmd_Close) XIO(Alm_FailOpen) ,XIO(Cfg_FailClose) XIC(Sts_Oper) [XIC(OCmd_Close) XIC(Sts_Ready) ,XIC(Out) ] XIO(OCmd_Open) XIO(Alm_FailClose) ,XIC(Cfg_FailClose) XIC(Sts_Prog) [XIC(PCmd_Open) XIC(Sts_Ready) ,XIC(Out) ] XIO(PCmd_Close) XIO(Alm_FailOpen) ,XIO(Cfg_FailClose) XIC(Sts_Prog) [XIC(PCmd_Close) XIC(Sts_Ready) ,XIC(Out) ] XIO(PCmd_Open) XIO(Alm_FailClose) ,XIO(Inp_IntlkOK) XIC(Interlock_Inv) ][XIC(Inp_IntlkOK) ,XIC(Interlock_Inv) ]OTE(Out);

Rung.Comment: If ANY alarm is Disabled, Inhibited or Suppressed, set the Alarm Inhibit summary status bit (which puts the "I" box on the graphic symbol).
Unlatching of Open and Close Commands from HMI

Status Bit Generation for HMI
ZSO = 0 and ZSC = 1; Valve Closed
Rung.Text: [XIC(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIC(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIO(Inp_OpenLS) XIC(Inp_ClosedLS) ,XIO(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIO(Inp_OpenLS) ,XIO(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIC(Inp_ClosedLS) ,XIO(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIO(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIO(Cfg_FailClose) XIC(Out) ,XIO(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIO(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIC(Cfg_FailClose) XIO(Out) ]MOVE(0,Val_Sts);

[XIC(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIC(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIC(Inp_OpenLS) XIO(Inp_ClosedLS) ,XIO(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIC(Inp_OpenLS) ,XIO(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIO(Inp_ClosedLS) ,XIO(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIO(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIO(Cfg_FailClose) XIO(Out) ,XIO(Cfg_HasClosedLS) XIO(Cfg_HasOpenLS) XIC(Cfg_FailClose) XIC(Out) ]MOVE(1,Val_Sts);

Rung.Comment: ZSO = 0 and ZSC = 0; Valve in Travelling

============================================================ NOTIFICATION VALUE ============================================================ Indicate the current alarm notification level as the max of any of the alarms, and set the low-order bit for reset or ack required: 0 = Not in alarm, acknowledged 1 = Not in alarm, unacknowledged or reset required 2 = Low severity alarm, acknowledged 3 = Low severity alarm, unacknowledged 4 = Medium severity alarm, acknowledged 5 = Medium severity alarm, unacknowledged 6 = High severity alarm, acknowledged 7 = High severity alarm, unacknowledged 8 = Urgent severity alarm, acknowledged 9 = Urgent severity alarm, unacknowledged ##### V4.00.00 2018-07-16: Added Val_NotifyAll and Val_UnackAlmC to roll up alarm ##### ##### priority / ack status and unack. alarm count. #####
Rung.Text: [CLR(Wrk_Notify) CLR(Wrk_UnackAlmC) ,GT(FailClose.Val_Notify,Wrk_Notify) MOVE(FailClose.Val_Notify,Wrk_Notify) ,GT(FailOpen.Val_Notify,Wrk_Notify) MOVE(FailOpen.Val_Notify,Wrk_Notify) ,[XIC(FailClose.Val_Notify.0) ADD(Wrk_UnackAlmC,1,Wrk_UnackAlmC) ,XIC(FailOpen.Val_Notify.0) ADD(Wrk_UnackAlmC,1,Wrk_UnackAlmC) ] OTE(Wrk_Notify.0) ,MOVE(Wrk_Notify,Val_Notify) MOVE(Wrk_Notify,Val_NotifyAll) MOVE(Wrk_UnackAlmC,Val_UnackAlmC) ];
